data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for optional uploader identity and source channel.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for 'Optional uploader identity and source channel', but the evidence provided does not confirm whether this requirement is satisfied. The linked use case mentions the need for an optional uploader identity and source channel, yet there is no specific evidence presented to demonstrate that these elements are included in the current saga run. This leads to an inconclusive status as the necessary validation cannot be performed without further evidence.
gaps: No evidence of optional uploader identity and source channel being captured.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
